channel.title: Blog on Sanjay Majumdar
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Sanjay Majumdar

item.title: Welcome to Sanjay Majumdar's Blog
item.description:
Welcome to sanjaymajumdar.com.np!

Here you will find:

  • 📝 Blog — Personal thoughts and articles
  • 🎥 Vlog — Video content and reviews
  • ✈️ Travel — My travel experiences across Nepal and beyond
  • 🎭 Entertainment — Fun and entertainment content
  • 💻 Tech Tips — Networking, Security, Firewall, Switching & Routing guides
